name: Consulting Agreement
description: A contract between an independent consultant and a client defining the scope of advisory services and payment terms.
content:
CONSULTING AGREEMENT

This Consulting Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of {{formatDate agreement_date}} (the "Effective Date") by and between {{client_name}} ("Client") and {{consultant_name}} ("Consultant").

1. THE PARTIES

Consultant:
Name/Company: {{consultant_name}}
Address: {{consultant_address}}
{{#if consultant_tax_id}}Tax ID / SSN: {{consultant_tax_id}}{{/if}}
Email: {{consultant_email}}

Client:
Name/Company: {{client_name}}
Address: {{client_address}}
{{#if client_tax_id}}Tax ID / EIN: {{client_tax_id}}{{/if}}
Email: {{client_email}}

2. SCOPE OF SERVICES

The Consultant agrees to provide advisory and consulting services to the Client regarding {{consulting_subject}} (the "Services"). The specific duties and deliverables include:

{{scope_of_services}}

3. TERM AND TERMINATION

This Agreement shall commence on {{formatDate start_date}} and will continue {{#if (eq duration_type 'Project Based')}}until the completion of the Services (estimated {{estimated_duration}}){{else}}for a period of {{duration_number}} {{duration_unit}}{{/if}}, unless earlier terminated by either party with {{notice_period}} days' written notice.

4. COMPENSATION AND PAYMENT

The Client shall pay the Consultant for the Services at the rate of {{payment_amount}} ({{payment_type}}).

Payment Terms: {{payment_terms}}

{{#if expenses}}

Out-of-Pocket Expenses: The Client agrees to reimburse the Consultant for reasonable, pre-approved expenses incurred in connection with the Services: {{expenses}}

{{/if}}

5. INDEPENDENT CONTRACTOR STATUS

The Consultant is an independent contractor. Nothing in this Agreement shall be construed to create an employer-employee, partnership, or agency relationship between the Client and the Consultant. The Consultant is solely responsible for all taxes, withholdings, and insurance related to their compensation.

6. CONFIDENTIALITY

The Consultant acknowledges that during the engagement, they may have access to the Client's proprietary and confidential information. The Consultant agrees not to disclose or use any such information for any purpose other than fulfilling their obligations under this Agreement.

7. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY

Any work product, reports, or deliverables created specifically for the Client under this Agreement shall become the sole property of the Client upon full payment of the agreed compensation. The Consultant retains all rights to their pre-existing methodologies, frameworks, and generalized knowledge.

Consultant

Signature: _________________________

{{consultant_name}}

Client

Signature: _________________________

{{client_name}}

fields.name: payment_terms
fields.label: Payment Terms
fields.placeholder: e.g., Net 30 days after invoice, 50% upfront.

fields.name: expenses
fields.label: Reimbursable Expenses (Optional)
fields.placeholder: e.g., Travel and lodging approved in advance.
